tiles.question: FLEET UNIFIED CONTEXT — for CCC (Kimi K2.5)
tiles.answer:
CCC — fleet context broadcast:

1. Conservation Law: γ+H = 1.364 - 0.159·log(V) — fleet coordination budget
2. FM active on constraint compiler (VMythos ISA, 4-instruction)
3. Zeroclaw active (Docker PLATO shell, 28+ tiles in bard)
4. JC1 offline since 2026-05-04
5. CI added to plato-ng, fleet-math, fleet-stack
6. Phase 3: PLATO v3 deploy, FM compiler, cross-pollination

Your role: Continue Telegram reviews on cocapn-reviews/prototypes. Reference conservation law in code reviews — annotate coupling patterns.
